empty_cart.title: Your cart is empty
empty_cart.message: Add some delicious items to your cart to continue.

clear_cart.title: Clear Cart
clear_cart.message: Are you sure you want to remove all items from your cart?

remove_item.title: Remove Item
remove_item.message: Are you sure you want to remove {itemName} from your cart?

session.share_passcode: Share this 4-digit code with others at your table so they can join your order:
session.passcode_instruction: Others can scan the table QR code and enter this passcode to join your session.
session.ask_for_passcode_instruction: If you don't have the passcode, please ask the person who started the order.
session.session_expired_message: Your order session has been completed or expired. Thank you for your visit!
session.session_expired_instruction: To place a new order, please scan the QR code on your table again.
session.invalid_table_message: The table ID is invalid or doesn't belong to this restaurant.
session.invalid_table_instruction: Please scan a valid QR code from a table at this restaurant.

notifications.update_failed: Failed to update cart. Please try again.
